title: centaurea damascena
intro: Centaurea damascena, also known as Damask rose or Qattan rose, is a flowering plant native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for various medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Centaurea damascena include soothing skin irritations, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health, among others. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, essential oils, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
